The '''Wandering Flyer 191''' was an aerospace [[Transport/Legends|transport]] craft that was manufactured by [[Mobquet Swoops and Speeders/Legends|Mobquet Swoops and Speeders]]. It was a popular transport used for personal and corporate use within the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. Powered by two [[Comet Motors]] [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]], it measured 7.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length and seated four. The Wandering Flyer 191 featured the familiar Mobquet fuselage design, but included structural reinforcements.<ref name="HSCS" />
